mapper.select: SELECT TRUNK_ID, TRUNK_NAME, TID, SYSNAME, ROADM_CODE , PTPNAME, PORT, OCRTIME, IN_OUT, VALUE_CUR , VALUE_MAX, VALUE_MIN, DIRECTION, ROUTENUM FROM MBA.TB_ROADM_OPTICAL_PERFORMANCE_HIST WHERE OCRTIME = #{ocrTime} ::timestamp AND TRUNK_ID = #{trunkId} AND DIRECTION = #{direction} ORDER BY TRUNK_ID, DIRECTION, ROUTENUM, IN_OUT
